context: Among respondents who back an opposition candidate, which opposition pairing they would most prefer as a joint ticket.
base: Opposition-leaning respondents only, not the full sample.
source_title: Ruto support weakening but fragmented opposition could hand him 2027 lifeline: poll
notes: Single source (Capital FM's report of the TIFA May 2026 release). Not independently cross-checked against a second outlet the way the topline horse-race figures were, so treat with slightly more caution. This measures preference for a hypothetical joint ticket among opposition-leaning respondents, not vote transfer efficiency if such a ticket actually formed — those are different things, and the coalition scenario lab's 'transfer efficiency' control is a separate, user-adjustable assumption, not calibrated to this number.
